note: CELCO Monday Report per-PC history. Per coordinator, per week: tracked=jobs the 5-day note standard applies to, past5=jobs past it, silent=aged-60+ AR accounts also past it, bal=$ in those silent accounts. "% current" on the report = (tracked-past5)/tracked — higher is better. Descriptive only: no score, no flag, no verdict is computed here. Started 2026-07; cannot be backfilled (pre-2026-07-13 BI bakes have no interaction data).
